g.text: Rule 1 | Always consume the longest possible valid token
Rule 2 | Never emit a shorter token when a longer one is possible
Rule 3 | Lookahead via peek() — inspect without consuming
Rule 4 | Consume second char via advance() ONLY if it extends the token
Rule 5 | Two-char checks MUST precede single-char fallback table
if is_at_end() | return False — nothing to consume
if source[current] != x | return False — no consume
advance() updates | line, column, current atomically
DO NOT | use current += 1 directly (breaks tracking)
